en: it's like 7 15 And so I'll read a book or maybe two or
three I'll add a few new paintings to my gallery I'll play guitar
and net and cook and basically Just wonder when will my life begin
Then after lunch it's puzzles and darts and baking Paper mache a
bit of L A and chess Pottery and ventriloquy candle making
Then I'll stretch maybe sketch take a climb go address And I'll reread the
books if I have time to spare I'll paint the wall some more I'm sure there's room somewhere
